Notice Of Settlement; Notice Of Motion & Motion To Dismiss First Through Seventh Causes Of Action With Prejudice And Eighth Cause Of Action Without Prejudice
Off Calendar May-02-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. CODY JAFFE, Esq. of Law Offices of Cody Jaffe (Tel: 415-524-3268) for plaintiff;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF JUSTIN WONG's Motion To Dismiss First Through Seventh Causes Of Action With Prejudice And Eighth Cause Of Action Without Prejudice.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to dismiss first through seventh causes of action with prejudice and eighth cause of action without prejudice" is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
